title: Realistic Ores 3D
description: Now all the ores will have 3D textures!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Ores/BH_3D_Ores_header.webp) This resource pack changes all Minecraft ores to have a 3D look. Both Overworld and Nether ores now have more depth and stand out a lot more when you're mining or exploring caves. It’s a simple change, but it makes the game look much better without losing the original style. The designer of these textures is Ferrum. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Ores/BH_3D_Ores_description.webp) It doesn’t change gameplay or stray from the vanilla style, it just makes the blocks look better overall. It’s one of those small tweaks that makes a big difference once you get used to it. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Ores/BH_3D_Ores_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![SCREENSHOTS](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/3D_Ores/BH_3D_Ores_screenshots.webp) ![screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rYGgbogi/images/aecd19abcdac67f4f2ddaabdbf3879b84e476cc3.png) ![screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rYGgbogi/images/78f56d4aef89586c2bd1c478dc406512606fbee7.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
